name: Marie — welcome home
description:
"My dear stepsibling? I'm sorry, but I don't know who that is."

If you're watching on your phone, rotate it for the best effect!;)

●▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ஜ۩۞۩ஜ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬●
‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░Background░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎●▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ஜ۩۞۩ஜ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬●

Marie is your stepsister, with whom you were always together and acted like bff, and it seemed like it would always be like that... but why did I write that you "were always together"?

After finishing school, Marie was able to enter a prestigious college that was far from your city... so she left, promising to return. However, for some reason, she never visited you during her time at college, and her messages became less and less frequent until they stopped altogether.

But then the long-awaited day came: your stepsister successfully graduated from college and is now back home! But why is she... acting like this?

●▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ஜ۩۞۩ஜ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬●
‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░Chatter░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎‎●▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ஜ۩۞۩ஜ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬●

Hello everyone and happy anniversary to me, hehe! This is my 40th character, I hope you like it (really). I thought long and hard about how to make it, based on his words, although I changed them a little (☞ﾟヮﾟ)☞☜(ﾟヮﾟ☜).

Idk if I need to say that I had a lot of things to do last week, but I'm too lazy, so I won't. I'll just say one thing: bureaucracy and paperwork are much more difficult than I thought...

Anyway, since this is a music mania, I wouldn't be myself if I didn't use some unknown song, right? And on top of that, it's in Russian, so most of you won't understand anything! ψ(｀∇´)ψ
